Class GoogleGenAiEmbeddingConnectionProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.google.genai.autoconfigure.embedding.GoogleGenAiEmbeddingConnectionProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.google.genai.embedding") public class GoogleGenAiEmbeddingConnectionProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for Google GenAI Embedding Connection.
Since:
1.1.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Mark Pollack, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan
